nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I generally dip in and out of it to tweak stuff, or edit things I've already made a start on

nodes.label: AI as neutral advisor for customer disputes
